raw.name: winui-code-review
raw.description: Code quality review for WinUI 3 apps — MVVM compliance, x:Bind correctness, accessibility, theming, security, and performance. Use before committing to catch issues that the compiler and UI tests won't find.

standard.name: winui-code-review
standard.description: Code quality review for WinUI 3 apps — MVVM compliance, x:Bind correctness, accessibility, theming, security, and performance. Use before committing to catch issues that the compiler and UI tests won't find.

raw.name: winui-design
raw.description: WinUI 3 UI design and XAML correctness — layout planning, control selection, Fluent Design, theming (Light/Dark/HighContrast), typography styles, spacing, brushes, accessibility, data binding review. Use when designing new pages, converting from WPF/Electron/web, reviewing XAML, fixing theme issues, or applying Fluent Design.

standard.name: winui-design
standard.description: WinUI 3 UI design and XAML correctness — layout planning, control selection, Fluent Design, theming (Light/Dark/HighContrast), typography styles, spacing, brushes, accessibility, data binding review. Use when designing new pages, converting from WPF/Electron/web, reviewing XAML, fixing theme issues, or applying Fluent Design.

raw.name: winui-dev-workflow
raw.description: Build and run workflow for WinUI 3 apps — project creation, BuildAndRun.ps1 script, winapp run, error diagnosis, and prerequisites. Use when building, running, or fixing build errors in a WinUI 3 project.

standard.name: winui-dev-workflow
standard.description: Build and run workflow for WinUI 3 apps — project creation, BuildAndRun.ps1 script, winapp run, error diagnosis, and prerequisites. Use when building, running, or fixing build errors in a WinUI 3 project.

raw.name: winui-packaging
raw.description: MSIX packaging, code signing, and distribution for WinUI 3 apps — build for release, certificate generation (winapp cert generate), certificate trust, code signing (winapp sign), self-contained deployment, CI/CD with GitHub Actions, and Microsoft Store submission. Use when preparing for release, creating MSIX installers, managing certificates, setting up CI/CD packaging, or publishing to the Microsoft Store.

standard.name: winui-packaging
standard.description: MSIX packaging, code signing, and distribution for WinUI 3 apps — build for release, certificate generation (winapp cert generate), certificate trust, code signing (winapp sign), self-contained deployment, CI/CD with GitHub Actions, and Microsoft Store submission. Use when preparing for release, creating MSIX installers, managing certificates, setting up CI/CD packaging, or publishing to the Microsoft Store.

raw.name: winui-session-report
raw.description: Analyze the current or a recent agent session (GitHub Copilot CLI or Claude Code) and generate a diagnostic report. Use when asking for session feedback, debugging agent behavior, or reviewing what happened during a build session.

standard.name: winui-session-report
standard.description: Analyze the current or a recent agent session (GitHub Copilot CLI or Claude Code) and generate a diagnostic report. Use when asking for session feedback, debugging agent behavior, or reviewing what happened during a build session.

raw.name: winui-setup
raw.description: Install and verify the prerequisites the win-dev-skills WinUI 3 toolchain depends on — .NET SDK 10, the WinApp CLI, the WinUI 3 .NET templates, and Developer Mode. Use when setting up a new machine, after a Windows reset, or when another winui skill reports a missing prerequisite (e.g., `winapp` not found, `dotnet` not found, the WinUI 3 templates are missing, or Developer Mode is off).

standard.name: winui-setup
standard.description: Install and verify the prerequisites the win-dev-skills WinUI 3 toolchain depends on — .NET SDK 10, the WinApp CLI, the WinUI 3 .NET templates, and Developer Mode. Use when setting up a new machine, after a Windows reset, or when another winui skill reports a missing prerequisite (e.g., `winapp` not found, `dotnet` not found, the WinUI 3 templates are missing, or Developer Mode is off).

raw.name: winui-ui-testing
raw.description: Automated UI testing for WinUI 3 apps — generate a batch test script, run all tests in one pass, read results. Covers element assertions, interactions, value checking (TextBox, ComboBox, ToggleSwitch), file pickers, flyouts, dialogs, persistence, and accessibility audits.

standard.name: winui-ui-testing
standard.description: Automated UI testing for WinUI 3 apps — generate a batch test script, run all tests in one pass, read results. Covers element assertions, interactions, value checking (TextBox, ComboBox, ToggleSwitch), file pickers, flyouts, dialogs, persistence, and accessibility audits.

raw.name: winui-wpf-migration
raw.description: Migrate WPF applications to WinUI 3 — namespace replacement (System.Windows → Microsoft.UI.Xaml), control mapping (DataGrid→ListView, WrapPanel→ItemsRepeater, TabControl→TabView), threading (Dispatcher→DispatcherQueue), imaging (System.Drawing→BitmapImage), MVVM conversion to CommunityToolkit.Mvvm, and DynamicResource→ThemeResource. Use when converting WPF code, replacing WPF namespaces, or fixing migration build errors.

standard.name: winui-wpf-migration
standard.description: Migrate WPF applications to WinUI 3 — namespace replacement (System.Windows → Microsoft.UI.Xaml), control mapping (DataGrid→ListView, WrapPanel→ItemsRepeater, TabControl→TabView), threading (Dispatcher→DispatcherQueue), imaging (System.Drawing→BitmapImage), MVVM conversion to CommunityToolkit.Mvvm, and DynamicResource→ThemeResource. Use when converting WPF code, replacing WPF namespaces, or fixing migration build errors.
